resume_1783353536185_3ys6x7efh.title: Housekeeper Resume
resume_1783353536185_3ys6x7efh.summary: Dedicated and detail-oriented housekeeper with over 3 years of experience in maintaining cleanliness and order in residential and commercial spaces. Proven ability to manage time effectively, execute thorough cleaning tasks, and uphold high standards of cleanliness. Strong communication and customer service skills, ensuring client satisfaction through quality care and attention to detail.

experience.description: Supervised a team of 10 housekeepers, ensuring the cleanliness of 150+ guest rooms and public areas.
achievements: Increased room cleaning efficiency by 20% through the implementation of a new cleaning schedule.
Received 'Employee of the Month' award twice for outstanding performance and client feedback.

experience.description: Performed thorough cleaning and sanitization of residential homes, ensuring client satisfaction and adherence to health standards.
achievements: Achieved a 95% client satisfaction rate based on feedback surveys.
Recognized for punctuality and dedication during peak cleaning seasons.

experience.description: Maintained 10 high-end rental properties, ensuring all areas were spotless before guest arrivals.
achievements: Reduced cleaning turnaround time by 15% while maintaining high standards of cleanliness.
Gained repeat business from landlords due to exceptional service quality.

resume_1783357408428_pn0mz0o69.title: Joseph Amon Khalechi's Resume
resume_1783357408428_pn0mz0o69.summary: Enthusiastic and dedicated IGCSE Math and PE Teacher with experience in learning and training students enhancing their knowledge, abilities and skills. Highly adaptable professional with a commitment to all aspects of student learning and promotion of growth.

experience.description: IGCSE Math and PE teacher/Sports teacher at Premier Academy. Duties included: Teaching IGCSE Mathematics and Physical Education.
achievements: Achieved consistently high student performance, with 95% of students meeting or exceeding grade expectations in IGCSE Mathematics examinations.
Collaborated with colleagues to develop and implement innovative teaching strategies, including the integration of technology to enhance math instruction.
Organized and coached successful sports teams, overseeing training sessions, strategizing game plans, and instilling values of sportsmanship and teamwork.
Organized math and sports-related extracurricular activities, including math competitions and sports tournaments, to encourage student participation and achievement.
Actively participated in professional development opportunities to stay updated on the latest teaching techniques and educational trends.

experience.description: Math and PE teacher/Sports teacher at Riara Group of Schools. Duties included: Teaching Math and Physical Education, Coaching and Training Swimming, Soccer and other sports.
achievements: Mentored and provided individualized support to students, addressing their unique learning needs and fostering a growth mindset.
Organized and coached successful sports teams, overseeing training sessions, strategizing game plans, and instilling values of sportsmanship and teamwork.

experience.job_title: H.O.D, PE Department and Math Teacher
experience.description: IGCSE PE and BTEC Teacher/Sports Coordinator at Brookhurst International School. Duties include: Teaching IGCSE Physical Education and IGCSE Mathematics, Coaching and Training Basketball, Swimming, Soccer, netball, rugby, rounders, cricket, hockey etc.
achievements: Worked well independently and on a team to solve problems.
Served as a friendly, hardworking, and punctual employee.
Organized and prioritized work to complete assignments in a timely, efficient manner.

education.degree: B. Ed Physical Education and Sports, Mathematics

skills.name: Ability to Work in a Team
